WF-07.title: Post-Visit No-Sale Nurture
built_by: 5.4a–e — Newport News - A&D Nurture - All Objections
5.4a–e — Virginia Beach - A&D Nurture - All Objections

findings.issue: WF-05 does not gate on appt_status before routing outcome
findings.evidence: no appointment / appt_status condition found among 0 if/else conditions
findings.fix: Gate first on appt_status: showed -> outcome routing; no-show/cancel -> WF-08; reschedule -> WF-03. Only then read sale_outcome.

findings.issue: No outcome_processed_at idempotency stamp in the outcome router
findings.evidence: token 'outcome_processed_at' not found in the step graph
findings.fix: Check outcome_processed_at at entry; skip re-routing and CAPI if set; stamp it after processing so edits do not double-fire.

findings.issue: Won branch does not set renewal_date
findings.evidence: token 'renewal_date' not found in the step graph
findings.fix: On every Won, set renewal_date = Won date + term_1.

findings.issue: No early-exit when the member rebooks
findings.evidence: no workflow goal / remove-from-workflow / rebook trigger found
findings.fix: Add a goal that exits the recovery sequence the moment a new appointment is booked, and hand back to WF-03.

findings.issue: No DND action found in the organized build
findings.evidence: no dnd_contact node in folders 00-07
findings.fix: WF-11 must own DND/STOP; enable DND on opt-out and honor it everywhere.
